---
name: Launch feedback
about: Share first-impression feedback on messaging, onboarding, or demos
title: "[feedback] "
---

## First impression

What made sense right away, and what did not?

## Friction

Where did you hesitate, get confused, or bounce?

## Most compelling part

What was the most interesting use case or feature?

## Missing proof

What would make you more likely to star, try, or share the project?
